name: init-terraform-code
description: Generate Terraform code for a change request. Checks memory cache, validates workspace, clones repo, fetches standards, generates code via Bedrock, and pushes to SCM.

agentSpawn.command: python3 -c "import requests, boto3, redis; print('{\"dependencies\":\"ok\"}')" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"dependencies":"missing","error":"install: pip install requests boto3 redis"}'
